comment: Movie recommendation database for Movie Night. Critic ratings: letterboxd is out of 5 (average rating), rottenTomatoes is the Tomatometer percentage, imdb is out of 10. art is a poster image URL (TMDB CDN) with a graceful in-app fallback if it fails to load.

movies.title: The Shawshank Redemption
movies.description: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

movies.title: The Godfather
movies.description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

movies.title: Pulp Fiction
movies.description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

movies.title: The Dark Knight
movies.description: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime as he faces the Joker, an agent of chaos bent on testing Gotham.

movies.title: Inception
movies.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

movies.title: Parasite
movies.description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Parks and the destitute Kims.

movies.title: Spirited Away
movies.description: During her family's move, a sullen girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits where humans become beasts.

movies.title: Forrest Gump
movies.description: The history of the United States from the 1950s to the 1970s unfolds through the perspective of a slow-witted Alabama man.

movies.title: The Matrix
movies.description: A hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

movies.title: Goodfellas
movies.description: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife and his mob partners.

movies.title: Whiplash
movies.description: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory whose ruthless instructor will stop at nothing.

movies.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
movies.description: A legendary concierge and his trusted lobby boy become embroiled in the theft of a priceless painting and a family fortune.

movies.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
movies.description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with a group of female prisoners.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
movies.description: Teen Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man and joins with five counterparts from other dimensions to stop a threat to all realities.

movies.title: Get Out
movies.description: A young Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and uncovers a disturbing secret.

movies.title: La La Land
movies.description: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love while pursuing their dreams in Los Angeles.

movies.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
movies.description: A meek Hobbit and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the One Ring and the dark lord Sauron.

movies.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
movies.description: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure where she alone can save existence by exploring other universes.

movies.title: Coco
movies.description: Aspiring musician Miguel enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

movies.title: Knives Out
movies.description: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric, combative family.

movies.title: Blade Runner 2049
movies.description: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard.

movies.title: The Lion King
movies.description: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after the murder of his father, only to learn the true meaning of responsibility.

movies.title: Alien
movies.description: The crew of a commercial spacecraft encounters a deadly lifeform after investigating an unknown transmission.

movies.title: Back to the Future
movies.description: A teenager is accidentally sent thirty years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean built by his eccentric scientist friend.

movies.title: Jurassic Park
movies.description: A pragmatic paleontologist touring an island theme park of cloned dinosaurs is forced to survive when they break loose.

movies.title: Toy Story
movies.description: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as top toy.

movies.title: Dune
movies.description: A gifted young man must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and people.

movies.title: The Silence of the Lambs
movies.description: A young FBI cadet must confide in an incarcerated cannibal killer to catch another serial killer on the loose.

movies.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
movies.description: Peter Parker's secret identity is revealed, and he asks Doctor Strange for help, fracturing the multiverse.

movies.title: Your Name
movies.description: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way: a city boy and a country girl begin swapping bodies.

movies.title: Casablanca
movies.description: A cynical expatriate club owner struggles to decide whether to help his former lover and her husband escape the Nazis.

movies.title: The Departed
movies.description: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in Boston.

movies.title: Up
movies.description: An elderly widower ties thousands of balloons to his house and flies to South America, inadvertently taking a young stowaway.

movies.title: Oppenheimer
movies.description: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

movies.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
movies.description: When a couple undergo a procedure to erase each other from their memories, they rediscover what they once had.

movies.title: The Shining
movies.description: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence.

movies.title: Gladiator
movies.description: A betrayed Roman general rises from slavery as a gladiator to seek vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.
